# Optional reminders (lightweight)

Add optional reminders:
- daily 15:00 energy log reminder
- morning reminders for scheduled Strength A/B (user configurable)

## Constraints
- Browser notifications only (no server).
- Must be opt-in.
- Provide a settings toggle.

## Deliverables
- `src/features/settings/notifications.ts`
- `src/app/settings/page.tsx`
